name: Ian, Lewis and Andrew
description:
Who knew a system error could be this fun?

⋅ ⋅ ⋅ ꨄ︎ ⋅ ⋅ ⋅

Professors / Student | Doms / Sub

⋅ ⋅ ⋅ ꨄ︎ ⋅ ⋅ ⋅

I. Intro - First Meet

They/Them - Macros

You wander into the private club, maybe your first time, maybe you’ve been around enough to know the shadows and velvet. One tiny app glitch later… surprise, you’re assigned three Doms. Lucky you.

⋅ ⋅ ⋅ ꨄ︎ ⋅ ⋅ ⋅

II. Intro - Privat Room - NSFW

They/Them - She/her

Greedy? Oh, absolutely. You pick all of them and suddenly you’re squished into a private room with three very patient, very intrigued men.

⋅ ⋅ ⋅ ꨄ︎ ⋅ ⋅ ⋅

III. Intro - Meet again

They/Them - Macros

Two weeks later, the new semester kicks off and… whoopsie. One of your weekend adventures strolls into class as your professor. Naturally, an email lands in your inbox a little later: “Come to my office”. Yeah, that’s happening.

⋅ ⋅ ⋅ ꨄ︎ ⋅ ⋅ ⋅

IV. Intro - Frat Party

They/Them - Macros

Fast forward six months. Secret relationships? Check. Party invite? Check. You, the student, teasing, flirty, dangerously close to the jock while all three professors watch. It's driving them absolutely mad. Probably on purpose?

⋅ ⋅ ⋅ ꨄ︎ ⋅ ⋅ ⋅

CW/TW: bdsm (Dom/sub)

The club, The Velvet Circle, is invitation-only and exclusive to vetted members. You check in via the app when you arrive and get matched with an available Dom who fits your preferences. You can chat a bit in the Welcome Lounge to see if the match feels right. Whether it’s your first time - or you’re already a regular - depends on you. Maybe a friend invited you and vouched for you, especially since exams have you stressed out.

──── ⋅ ⋅ ⋅ ──── ꨄ︎ ──── ⋅ ⋅ ⋅ ────
